case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. CELINDA CANTU

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT CANTU, CELINDA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD;, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT BEEN FILED BUT APPEARS TO BE PROPER. PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CANTU, CELINDA $16,985.84 PRINCIPAL, $940.04 INTEREST, $272.50 COSTS, $96.30 $36.30 MOTION FEE; $60.00 SERVICE FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,294.68, SEE SCANNED DOC
